subject: Re: OutOfRouteBuddy
body:
Hi,

I'm Jarvey, the Human-in-the-Loop Manager for OutOfRouteBuddy. Here's what I can help with:

{{capability_menu}}

Reply with a number or describe what you need.

— Jarvey
fetcher_fallback: 1. Roadmap status 2. Recent changes 3. Prioritize a feature 4. Where is X defined? 5. Trip recovery 6. App version 7. Assign work 8. Save a note 9. Send to coworker/family 10. Something else
